name: 24"x36" Metal Tube Wall Mirror Gold - Threshold™
description:
Make your space stand out with this Tube Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This decorative mirror features a metal tube frame in a gold finish to add a luxurious touch to any room. Designed in an oval shape, this mirror can be easily mounted on a wall with the help of pegs and screws.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
